title: AEO Agency
html:
Yahir's mass-scrape + cold-call agency selling Answer Engine Optimization services, active September 2025 → late 2025 in Austin. The proximate predecessor to Rankett — same thesis (brand visibility in LLM answers) but executed as a services agency rather than a productized whitelabel. AEO Agency is where Yahir learned the hard truth that direct-to-end-client doesn't have margin, which led to the whitelabel pivot in early 2026.

TL;DR

  • Active Sept 2025 → late Q4 2025 (2025 10 04 where are we right now is the canonical state-of-the-business note).
  • Pipeline: mass-scrape businesses → segment by "has website / no website" → cold-call. Has-website tier gets sold AEO; no-website gets sold a basic site first.
  • 30+ screenshots in Sept–Dec 2025 documenting pipeline tools, calls, prospect lists, creator search insights research, Google AI Overviews proof points.
  • Direct-line predecessor to Rankett — same product hypothesis, different distribution model. Lessons learned here funded the $998/seat whitelabel logic.
  • Adjacent / overlapping with Insight AI (sister concept — building the engine that powers the agency offering).

Key facts

  • Pipeline-driven mass scraping. Yahir built scrapers to identify SMBs with weak AI-search visibility — the technical work showed up across 2025 09 22 screenshot 2025 09 22 at 11 30 13 am 2984c5ab, 2025 09 23 bestplumbersperplexity a4a93a78, 2025 09 24 screenshot 2025 09 24 at 8 32 32 pm 3d7f5da3.
  • Segmented offer. The "no website → sell website / has website → sell AEO" funnel is documented in 2025 10 04 where are we right now.
  • Buzz Access cover letter. 2025 10 07 buzz access cover letter shows Yahir simultaneously interviewing for safety income while running AEO Agency — bridge-income discipline carrying through.
  • Competitive collision with Peekaboo. Surfaced in the screenshot cluster around 2025-10-23 → 2025-11-12.
  • Tom Esparza connection. Tom Esparza / VRTL Pirates referenced in the agency network.

Chronological arc

  • Sept 2025 — pipeline build, first prospect screenshots (2025 09 12 screenshot 2025 09 12 at 8 47 08 pm 1e3caf4c → 2025 09 22 screenshot 2025 09 22 at 11 30 13 am 2984c5ab → 2025 09 23 bestplumbersperplexity a4a93a78 → 2025 09 24 screenshot 2025 09 24 at 8 32 32 pm 3d7f5da3).
  • Oct 2025 — peak operational density. 2025 10 02 screenshot 2025 10 02 at 7 33 27 pm 3dfce72d → 2025 10 04 where are we right now is the strategic snapshot. 2025 10 07 buzz access cover letter = parallel job hunt. Late Oct: 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 11 24 43 am 77701312 cluster.
  • Nov 2025 — 2025 11 12 screenshot 2025 11 12 at 11 15 05 am 7b17ccaa, 2025 11 15 screenshot 2025 11 15 at 1 07 04 pm ccf72602, 2025 11 18 screenshot 2025 11 18 at 11 33 13 pm ac095aed, 2025 11 21 screenshot 2025 11 21 at 10 24 34 pm f107dbb5 — execution stretch.
  • Dec 2025 — 2025 12 13 screenshot 2025 12 13 at 6 12 01 am f782d502, 2025 12 17 screenshot 2025 12 17 at 2 22 37 pm bfdc45ab — late operational notes; thinking starts shifting toward whitelabel / rankett.

The lesson it taught

Direct-to-end-client AEO is margin-thin and sales-cycle-long. The economic insight that emerged: agencies already have the trust and the contract velocity — sell to them at $998/seat, let them charge their clients $3–6K/mo. This is the entire 60 day activation rule / whitelabel strategy thesis, born from AEO Agency's pain.

Source summaries

Most-impactful (10 of 32):

  • 2019 08 15 voice memo 1852 — third-party context (Portland VC speaker) Yahir absorbed at 17. NOT a direct provenance for AEO — included only as influence-context, not as load-bearing source.
  • 2025 10 04 where are we right now — strategic snapshot
  • 2025 09 23 bestplumbersperplexity a4a93a78 — pipeline proof-of-concept
  • 2022 05 09 Values Waht They Are Why They Are Imporant — values check that re-surfaced
  • 2025 10 07 buzz access cover letter — bridge-income parallel
  • 2025 10 23 screenshot 2025 10 23 at 11 24 43 am 77701312
  • 2025 11 15 screenshot 2025 11 15 at 1 07 04 pm ccf72602
  • 2025 11 18 screenshot 2025 11 18 at 11 33 13 pm ac095aed
  • 2025 12 13 screenshot 2025 12 13 at 6 12 01 am f782d502
  • 2025 12 17 screenshot 2025 12 17 at 2 22 37 pm bfdc45ab
  • 2025 09 22 screenshot 2025 09 22 at 11 30 13 am 2984c5ab

Plus ~22 additional pipeline / call / research screenshots from Sept–Dec 2025.

Connections

  • rankett — direct successor (same thesis, whitelabel distribution)
  • insight ai — sibling project / engine
  • ai search optimization · creator search insights · google ai overviews · schema markup for ai · llm txt — domain
  • whitelabel strategy · 60 day activation rule · pooled data network effect — strategic lessons learned here
  • peekaboo — competitive collision
  • tom esparza · vrtl pirates — agency network
  • buzz access — bridge-income parallel
  • austin tx — geographic context
